storageSemantics: Working tree bytes, Git blob bytes, Git object-store bytes, dist bytes, Pages artifact metadata, and route-referenced bytes are separate measures and are not additive unless explicitly stated.
GitHub diskUsage is API metadata in KB, not byte-precise local storage accounting.
Current-tree Top 100 is based on HEAD blobs; reachable-history Top 100 is based on rev-list --objects --all and cat-file.
Historical first and last commits are object association events found with git log --find-object, not every commit during which the blob persisted.
Duplicate candidates are evidence only; source deletion, deduplication, LFS migration, or history rewrite was not authorized.
